feature_summary.name: Quick Search
feature_summary.goal: Authenticated users can run quick flight searches from the dedicated quick-search page.

capabilities: Type origin and destination IATA or partial airport queries
Use autocomplete suggestions with mouse or keyboard
See validation feedback when required route data is missing

functional_requirements: Typing a partial query in an airport field shows autocomplete suggestions.
Selecting a suggestion with the mouse fills the field with the airport IATA code and closes the suggestions list.
Keyboard navigation with ArrowDown and Enter can select an autocomplete suggestion.
Clearing an airport field hides its suggestions list.
Submitting without a route shows a visible validation error on the quick-search page.
Providing a valid route and outbound date enables search submission without inline validation errors.
out_of_scope: Dashboard-only shortcuts outside the quick-search flow
